name: /agent-verify jsonl audit entry includes diff_sha256 and an ISO8601 timestamp per F-3
command:
printf 'diff stub
' > d.txt && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash
echo "verdict: agree"
' > v.sh && chmod +x v.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-verify.sh" --diff d.txt --verifier-stub ./v.sh 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const ln=require("fs").readFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/agent-verify.jsonl","utf8").split("
").filter(Boolean).pop();const e=JSON.parse(ln);process.exit(e.diff_sha256&&/^[0-9a-f]{64}$/.test(e.diff_sha256)&&/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}T/.test(e.timestamp)?0:1)' && echo audit 1>&2
